svg.title: Two-scope memory system design
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing global central store on C drive and project-level context folder, with write triggers and MCP server layer

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Claude Code read from the memory system?')
sendPrompt('How does Cursor read from the memory system?')
sendPrompt('How does Codex read from the memory system?')
sendPrompt('How does GPT read from the memory system?')
sendPrompt('How do web agents read from the memory system?')
sendPrompt('How does the CLI tool work for web agents?')
sendPrompt('What does the preferences store contain?')
sendPrompt('How does the cross-project error index work?')
sendPrompt('What tech stack preferences get stored globally?')
g.text: Always use X over Y decisions

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What agent settings are stored globally?')
sendPrompt('What does the active task file look like?')
sendPrompt('What goes in the file map context file?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the project architecture file?')
sendPrompt('How are errors + fixes tracked per project?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the theme and UI decisions file?')

g.text: git commit hook · amnesia CLI · auto-flush when session context > 80% · manual amnesia save
Global DB → GitHub / OneDrive · Project /context → committed with code
